# Backyard Estates

> Backyard Estates is an ADU (accessory dwelling unit) design-build contractor headquartered in Upland, California. We handle design, plans, permitting, and construction in-house with all-in pricing, serving the Inland Empire, San Bernardino County, Riverside County, and Los Angeles County (roughly a 30-mile radius from Upland).

An "ADU" is also commonly called a granny flat, in-law suite, casita, guest house, second unit, or backyard home — Backyard Estates builds all of these.

## Company facts

- Name: Backyard Estates
- Type: ADU design-build general contractor (design, permits, and construction handled in-house)
- Office: 2335 W Foothill Blvd #18, Upland, CA 91786
- Phone: (909) 500-0917
- Email: contact@backyardestates.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM
- Service area: Inland Empire, San Bernardino County, Riverside County, and Los Angeles County (~30 miles from Upland, CA)

## Why homeowners choose Backyard Estates

- Fully managed, stress-free process — Backyard Estates handles design, all city departments, permitting, and construction end to end. Homeowners frequently describe the experience as smooth and stress-free ("I had to do nothing," "no stress whatsoever").
- All-in, transparent pricing — one price covers design, plans, permits, site work, appliances, fixtures, finishes, project management, and solar on Estate 500 and larger. The exact price is confirmed up front through a Formal Property Analysis.
- On-time and on-budget delivery, with a week-by-week construction timeline.
- Experienced, trusted local team — homeowners cite integrity and reliability ("we always felt completely safe in their hands," "they do exactly what they say").
- Strong fit for multigenerational living (aging parents, adult children) and for rental income / building wealth.

## Floor plans

Backyard Estates offers a range of standard ADU floor plans (the "Estate" series, e.g. Estate 400 through Estate 950 and larger) plus fully custom designs. Plans vary by bedrooms, bathrooms, and square footage, all with all-in pricing. See: https://www.backyardestates.com/floorplans

## Service-area city pages

Backyard Estates has completed real ADU projects across these cities (each has a dedicated local page at https://www.backyardestates.com/adu-builder/[city]):
Upland, Rancho Cucamonga, Montclair, Chino, Claremont, La Verne, Glendora, Covina, West Covina, Pomona, Temple City, Montebello (Los Angeles & San Bernardino counties); Corona and Norco (Riverside County).

## California ADU facts (apply across our service area)

- Cities must approve a complete ADU application ministerially (no public hearing) within 60 days.
- Detached ADUs up to 800 sq ft with 4-foot side/rear setbacks are allowed by right; most lots qualify for up to 1,200 sq ft.
- No added off-street parking can be required within half a mile of public transit.
- Owner-occupancy cannot be required for ADUs permitted through the end of 2025 — so an ADU can be a true rental-income property.
